Date: Mon, 29 Jan 2024 12:58:40 -0800
Subject: Enemy drone that hit US base in Jordan possibly confused with American drone

Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<td id="Card17719095" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>

                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title17719095" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="Href17719095" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADWVFDUTNRWRYMW2A5H4MGK6SZTYLHHOHKRZ5DZ3XUSEUOQFPWJRKX64IAY5NJVJEE6SRXMIXGWM4LESRAYW3J5XVHKIESXTNNJN62WW56ZH7RPOAAMDAPYP2AW3O4B2TUWBRFISNAKJRXF6OX7HWC6GBUJDDV25YHFILP5PG6OXMITXOT6OE3TTR6T7HJAP75E7JRL7GNHV7L3XYBYC7DTMARE4MYE2G57YX5R2YYCLJXCMILVH5T5RCMBW3FFJBOEBTC22RYZT7P5M7L3RW34BAS6A&d=AIAACB762RFHTGICFBC7MYFEO7OOYW7X5YBKTXBRCETS5VQNBDESAMFKKRG3X3JZLBUITXV6PLUEJ7VYNRPAP3M3LDDV6GZWYMS5SOH5OLVZJKMXJNOGUITKNXHGHK2MXAPM2CLWXV34YZS6HJXPELW3ZRGUHDBJKE6SJ4JXAW4TKXMLKP4VELOB&" target="_blank">
                        Lauren Boebert's Colorado Gamble Backfires
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

<tr>
    <td align="center">
        <br>
        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">
